awk-group-sum: awk -F',' 'NR>1 {sum[$1]+=$3} END {for (k in sum) print k, sum[k]}' sales.csv
env-missing-keys: awk -F'=' 'NR==FNR && /^[^#]/ && NF>1 {keys[$1]; next} FNR==NR {next} /^[^#]/ && NF>1 && !($1 in keys) {print FNR": "$1}' .env .env.example
find-hardlink-groups: find . -type f -links +1 -exec stat -f '%i %N' {} + | sort -n | awk '{if($1==prev){if(!printed){print last}; print; printed=1} else {printed=0}; prev=$1; last=$0}'
jsonl-p95-routes: jq -r 'select(.status >= 500 and .status < 600) | [.route, (.latency_ms | tostring)] | @tsv' requests.jsonl | awk -F'\t' '{data[$1][++n[$1]]=$2} END {for (r in data) {asort(data[r]); idx=int(n[r]*0.95); if(idx<1) idx=1; print data[r][idx], r}}' | sort -rn | head -3
k8s-old-tls-secrets: kubectl get secrets --all-namespaces --field-selector type=kubernetes.io/tls -o json | jq -r --arg cutoff "2026-04-06T00:00:00Z" '.items[] | select(.metadata.creationTimestamp < $cutoff) | [.metadata.namespace, .metadata.name, .metadata.creationTimestamp] | @tsv'
log-window-uniq-ip: awk '$9 !~ /^2[0-9][0-9]$/ && match($4, /14:(0[0-9]|1[0-5])/) { split($4, t, /[:/]/); min=t[4]":"t[5]; if (!seen[min,$1]++) count[min]++ } END { for (m in count) print m, count[m] }' access.log | sort
loop-backup-copies: for f in *.conf; do cp "$f" "$f.bak"; done
yaml-image-policy: find . \( -path ./charts -o -path ./vendor \) -prune -o \( -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' \) -print | xargs grep -h 'image:' | sed 's/.*image: *//; s/^["'"'"']//; s/["'"'"']$//' | tr -d ' ' | grep -E '(:latest$|^[^:]+$)' | sort -u
